overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting a character exploring ancient Alexandria. The character walks through a bustling harbor market, ascends stone stairs to a waterfront promenade lined with obelisks, and approaches a grand classical temple with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor market with wooden docks and market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the sandy harbor market, passing wooden docks and fabric canopies

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside a market stall with orange fabric canopy

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the harbor walkway
market stall covered with orange fabric canopy supported by wooden poles
ancient warship with wooden hull and mast docked in the harbor
tall stone column rising behind the market stalls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bustling ancient harbor market with sandy ground and wooden dock structures. Market stalls with orange fabric canopies line the path, while an ancient trireme ship is docked in the water to the right. The scene is bright and sunny with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide stone staircase ascending from harbor to upper promenade

events.description: character begins ascending wide stone stairs leaving the harbor market behind

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone staircase flanked by a large ivy-covered building

notable_agents.action: woman in pink dress ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: broad stone stairs with multiple steps leading upward
large stone building facade covered with green ivy vines
tall pole with red and white fabric banners fluttering
trimmed green bushes lining the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase leaving the sandy harbor behind. To the left, a massive classical building covered in ivy rises above manicured hedges. Stone flagpoles with banners mark the top of the stairs as the environment transitions from open harbor to structured architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with obelisks and classical statues

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters paved waterfront promenade with harbor view

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved promenade passing stone benches and obelisks

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking alongside the path

entered.detail: intricately patterned stone tile pavement in geometric designs
tall dark stone obelisk with gold tip marking the promenade
stone seating along the parapet wall
white marble statue of a robed figure on pedestal
low stone wall separating the walkway from the harbor drop

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elegant stone-paved promenade lined with tall black obelisks and classical marble statues. The walkway features geometric tile patterns and stone benches, with a low parapet wall offering views of the harbor. Other pedestrians stroll along the waterfront path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with view of the Lighthouse of Alexandria

events.description: turns right into open plaza revealing the Lighthouse of Alexandria across the water
camera pans to follow the view of the lighthouse and harbor

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the waterfront edge to view the lighthouse

entered.detail: tall white lighthouse with smoke rising from the top, visible across the harbor
beached ancient ship hull displayed as a monument
large rectangular planter with green shrubs

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a spacious open plaza revealing the iconic Lighthouse of Alexandria in the distance across the harbor. An ancient ship hull is displayed prominently in the center of the plaza. The camera pans to take in the view of the lighthouse and surrounding cityscape before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with classical statue and columned entrance

events.description: turns left toward the large classical temple building with columns

agents.ego_description: walking toward the grand temple entrance, passing a large marble statue

notable_agents.action: group of citizens conversing in the temple courtyard

entered.detail: massive stone temple with tall columns and triangular pediment
large white marble statue of a robed female figure on pedestal
tall dark green cypress trees flanking the temple entrance
large wooden double doors with bronze detailing at temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward a grand classical temple with massive columns and a triangular pediment. A prominent marble statue of a robed figure stands in the courtyard, while tall cypress trees frame the temple entrance. Groups of citizens gather and converse in the paved courtyard as the character approaches the large wooden temple doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling, sandy harbor market into the structured grandeur of a classical temple complex. It begins by weaving through market stalls with orange canopies and wooden docks beside a docked trireme under a bright, clear sky. As the character leaves the harbor, the scene shifts upward along a wide stone staircase flanked by ivy-covered buildings and manicured hedges, leading onto an elegant stone-paved promenade lined with black obelisks and marble statues. The path then opens into a spacious plaza where the camera pans to reveal the iconic Lighthouse of Alexandria in the distance and a displayed ship hull in the center. Finally, the movement turns toward a grand classical temple, passing through a courtyard of cypress trees and gathering citizens to approach the massive columns and wooden temple doors.
